subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-29 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I was a child, nine years old. In the thick of those calamities, when the enemy attacked, they stoned our house
subcodes.first_line_orig: من طفل بودم بسن نُه سالگی در بحبوحه بلایا و هجوم  اعداء از بس سنگ بخانه ما
subcodes.subjects: @youth and pre-ministry of Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
